q: How many Psalms are there in the standard biblical book?
e: The Book of Psalms contains 150 individual songs and prayers.

q: Which Psalm begins with 'The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want'?
e: Psalm 23 is perhaps the most famous of all Psalms.

q: What is the longest Psalm in the Bible?
What is the shortest Psalm in the Bible?
Who is credited with writing the largest number of Psalms?
e: David is traditionally credited with 73 of the Psalms.

q: Which Psalm is known as the 'Psalm of Repentance' written by David after his sin with Bathsheba?
e: Psalm 51:1 — 'Have mercy on me, O God...'

q: Which Psalm is a prayer of Moses?
e: Psalm 90 is titled 'A prayer of Moses the man of God.'

q: Which Psalm says, 'Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path'?
Which Psalm begins with 'Bless the LORD, O my soul; and all that is within me, bless his holy name'?
Which Psalm starts with 'The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of his hands'?
Which Psalm says, 'Make a joyful noise unto the LORD, all ye lands'?
Which Psalm begins with 'As the deer pants for streams of water, so my soul pants for you, my God'?
Which Psalm did Jesus quote on the cross: 'My God, my God, why have you forsaken me?'
Which Psalm says, 'He who dwells in the shelter of the Most High will rest in the shadow of the Almighty'?
Which Psalm says, 'I lift up my eyes to the mountains—where does my help come from?'
Which Psalm says, 'This is the day the LORD has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it'?
Which Psalm says, 'Children are a heritage from the LORD, offspring a reward from him'?
Which Psalm says, 'How good and pleasant it is when God’s people live together in unity!'?
Which Psalm says, 'For you created my inmost being; you knit me together in my mother’s womb'?
The final Psalm in the book (150) ends with what instruction?
o: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD

q: What is the common Hebrew musical or liturgical term found 71 times in the Psalms?
e: Selah is likely a musical pause or a call to reflect.

q: Which group of Psalms (120-134) were sung by pilgrims traveling to Jerusalem?
e: They are also called Pilgrim Songs.

q: Who was the chief musician appointed by David to whom 12 Psalms are attributed?
e: Asaph was a leader of choral worship.

q: Which Psalm says, 'The fool says in his heart, "There is no God"'?
Which Psalm says, 'God is our refuge and strength, an ever-present help in trouble'?
Which Psalm says, 'Be still, and know that I am God'?
Which Psalm says, 'Taste and see that the LORD is good; blessed is the one who takes refuge in him'?
Which Psalm says, 'The LORD is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit'?
Which Psalm says, 'O LORD, our Lord, how majestic is your name in all the earth!'?
Which Psalm says, 'Create in me a pure heart, O God, and renew a steadfast spirit within me'?
Which Psalm says, 'By the rivers of Babylon we sat and wept when we remembered Zion'?
Which Psalm repeats the refrain 'His love endures forever' in every verse?
e: Psalm 136 has 26 verses, each ending with this refrain.

q: Which Psalm says, 'I praise you because I am fearfully and wonderfully made'?
Which Psalm says, 'Unless the LORD builds the house, the builders labor in vain'?
Which Psalm says, 'Better is one day in your courts than a thousand elsewhere'?
Which Psalm says, 'The earth is the LORD’s, and everything in it'?
Which Psalm says, 'Out of the depths I cry to you, LORD'?
Which Psalm says, 'He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds'?
Which Psalm says, 'The LORD is my light and my salvation—whom shall I fear?'?
Which Psalm says, 'Blessed is the one who does not walk in step with the wicked'?
Which Psalm says, 'Those who sow with tears will reap with songs of joy'?
Which Psalm says, 'Your rod and your staff, they comfort me'?
Which Psalm says, 'Who may ascend the mountain of the LORD? Who may stand in his holy place?'?
Which Psalm says, 'Wait for the LORD; be strong and take heart and wait for the LORD'?
Which Psalm says, 'Deep calls to deep in the roar of your waterfalls'?
Which Psalm says, 'Search me, God, and know my heart; test me and know my anxious thoughts'?
Which Psalm says, 'Commit your way to the LORD; trust in him and he will do this'?
Which Psalm says, 'What is mankind that you are mindful of them, human beings that you care for them?'?
Which Psalm says, 'I was glad when they said unto me, Let us go into the house of the LORD'?
Which Psalm says, 'Precious in the sight of the LORD is the death of his faithful servants'?
Which Psalm says, 'He will cover you with his feathers, and under his wings you will find refuge'?
Which Psalm says, 'The LORD is my rock, my fortress and my deliverer'?
Which Psalm says, 'Keep me as the apple of your eye; hide me in the shadow of your wings'?
Which Psalm says, 'May the words of my mouth and this meditation of my heart be pleasing in your sight'?
Which Psalm says, 'You will show me the path of life; in your presence is fullness of joy'?
Which Psalm says, 'He leads me beside quiet waters, he refreshes my soul'?
Which Psalm says, 'Even though I walk through the darkest valley, I will fear no evil'?
Which Psalm says, 'Lord, you have been our dwelling place throughout all generations'?
Which Psalm says, 'Teach us to number our days, that we may gain a heart of wisdom'?
Which Psalm says, 'Satisfy us in the morning with your unfailing love'?
Which Psalm says, 'For he will command his angels concerning you to guard you in all your ways'?
Which Psalm says, 'The righteous will flourish like a palm tree'?
Which Psalm says, 'The LORD reigns, he is robed in majesty'?
Which Psalm says, 'Come, let us bow down in worship, let us kneel before the LORD our Maker'?
Which Psalm says, 'Sing to the LORD a new song; sing to the LORD, all the earth'?
Which Psalm says, 'Worship the LORD in the splendor of his holiness'?
Which Psalm says, 'Light shines on the righteous and joy on the upright in heart'?
Which Psalm says, 'Know that the LORD is God. It is he who made us, and we are his'?
Which Psalm says, 'Enter his gates with thanksgiving and his courts with praise'?
Which Psalm says, 'I will lift up the cup of salvation and call on the name of the LORD'?
Which Psalm says, 'The stone the builders rejected has become the cornerstone'?
Which Psalm says, 'Open my eyes that I may see wonderful things in your law'?
Which Psalm says, 'I have hidden your word in my heart that I might not sin against you'?
Which Psalm says, 'Your word is settled in heaven forever'?
Which Psalm says, 'Seven times a day I praise you for your righteous laws'?
Which Psalm says, 'Great peace have those who love your law, and nothing can make them stumble'?
Which Psalm says, 'My help comes from the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth'?
Which Psalm says, 'The LORD will keep your going out and your coming in'?
Which Psalm says, 'Pray for the peace of Jerusalem'?
Which Psalm says, 'As the mountains surround Jerusalem, so the LORD surrounds his people'?
Which Psalm says, 'He who goes out weeping, carrying seed to sow, will return with songs of joy'?
Which Psalm says, 'Your wife will be like a fruitful vine within your house; your children will be like olive shoots around your table'?
Which Psalm says, 'If you, LORD, kept a record of sins, LORD, who could stand?'?
Which Psalm says, 'But with you there is forgiveness, so that we can, with reverence, serve you'?
Which Psalm says, 'I have calmed and quieted myself, I am like a weaned child with its mother'?
Which Psalm says, 'Praise the name of the LORD; praise him, you servants of the LORD'?
Which Psalm says, 'Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good. His love endures forever'?
e: Psalm 136:1 (This Psalm is famous for this refrain).

q: Which Psalm says, 'If I forget you, Jerusalem, may my right hand forget its skill'?
Which Psalm says, 'Though I walk in the midst of trouble, you preserve my life'?
Which Psalm says, 'Where can I go from your Spirit? Where can I flee from your presence?'?
Which Psalm says, 'If I rise on the wings of the dawn, if I settle on the far side of the sea, even there your hand will guide me'?
Which Psalm says, 'Your eyes saw my unformed body; all the days ordained for me were written in your book'?
Which Psalm says, 'Set a guard over my mouth, LORD; keep watch over the door of my lips'?
Which Psalm says, 'I cry aloud to the LORD; I lift up my voice to the LORD for mercy'?
Which Psalm says, 'Let the morning bring me word of your unfailing love, for I have put my trust in you'?
Which Psalm says, 'Teach me to do your will, for you are my God; may your good Spirit lead me on level ground'?
Which Psalm says, 'The LORD is gracious and compassionate, slow to anger and rich in love'?
Which Psalm says, 'The LORD is good to all; he has compassion on all he has made'?
Which Psalm says, 'The LORD is near to all who call on him, to all who call on him in truth'?
Which Psalm says, 'Do not put your trust in princes, in human beings, who cannot save'?
Which Psalm says, 'The LORD sets prisoners free, the LORD gives sight to the blind'?
Which Psalm says, 'He determines the number of the stars and calls them each by name'?
Which Psalm says, 'Praise the LORD from the heavens; praise him in the heights above'?
Which Psalm says, 'Sing to the LORD a new song, his praise in the assembly of his faithful people'?
The Book of Psalms is divided into how many 'books'?
e: The Psalms are organized into five books, each ending with a doxology.

q: Which Psalm is the only one titled as 'A Psalm for giving grateful praise'?
e: Psalm 100 is uniquely titled this way.

q: Which Psalm is called the 'Shepherd Psalm'?
e: Psalm 23 is universally known as the Shepherd Psalm.

q: Which Psalm says, 'He who goes out weeping, bearing seed for sowing, shall come home with shouts of joy'?
Which Psalm is a praise for God's creation, following the order of Genesis 1?
e: Psalm 104 describes God's creation and care for the world.
